# Clearwater Plumbing & Drains
> Third-generation plumbing experts serving Kingston and Frontenac County since 1968.

## About
Clearwater Plumbing & Drains is a family-owned plumbing business in Kingston, Ontario. Founded in 1968 by Harold Buckley, the company is now run by third-generation plumber Dave Buckley. We specialize in emergency drain clearing, water heater installation, heritage home re-piping, bathroom and kitchen renovations, and backflow prevention and testing.

## Services
- Emergency Drain Clearing (24/7)
- Water Heater Installation & Repair
- Heritage Home Re-piping
- Bathroom & Kitchen Renovations
- Backflow Prevention & Testing

## Service Area
Kingston, Napanee, Gananoque, and surrounding Frontenac County, Ontario, Canada.

## Contact
- Phone: (613) 555-0187

- Website: https://clearwaterplumbing.ca
